info.name: Tanish Physio API
info.description: API collection for Tanish Physio application with Razorpay integration

item.name: Get User Profile
item.description: Retrieves user profile information including subscription data. Returns subscriptionData with active/paid subscription details, or the most recent subscription if none are active.

formdata.value: Patient responds well to manual therapy techniques. Avoid deep tissue massage on left side.

formdata.value: Comprehensive physical therapy session for rehabilitation

This detailed service provides comprehensive physical therapy including assessment, treatment planning, and personalized exercises to help restore mobility and reduce pain. Our experienced therapists use evidence-based techniques tailored to your specific condition and goals.
Updated comprehensive physical therapy session for rehabilitation
Updated detailed service description with enhanced therapeutic approaches and advanced treatment techniques for optimal recovery outcomes.

item.name: Create Booking
item.description: Creates a new booking. The therapistId parameter is no longer required and will be automatically assigned based on service availability. An available admin user (therapist) will be automatically selected.

body.raw:
{
  "serviceId": "service_id_here",
  "date": "2024-03-25",
  "time": "10:00",
  "notes": "Patient has lower back pain, bring medical records.",
  "clientName": "John Doe"
}

item.name: Create Guest Booking
item.description: Creates a new booking for guest users. An account will be created for the user, but login credentials will only be sent after successful payment verification.

body.raw:
{
  "serviceId": "service_id_here",
  "date": "2024-03-25",
  "time": "10:00",
  "notes": "Patient has lower back pain, bring medical records.",
  "clientName": "John Doe",
  "clientEmail": "john@example.com",
  "clientPhone": "+919876543210"
}

item.name: Create Session (User)
item.description: Creates a new session. The therapistId parameter is no longer required and will be automatically assigned from the associated booking. Automatically updates availability status from 'available' to 'booked' for the specified time slot.

item.name: Create Session (Admin)
item.description: Creates a new session for any user. Requires userId, therapistId, and either bookingId or subscriptionId. Automatically updates availability status from 'available' to 'booked' for the specified time slot.

item.name: Update Session (User)
item.description: Update session details. If time is changed, automatically updates availability status: marks old time slot as 'available' and new time slot as 'booked'.

item.name: Update Session (Admin)
item.description: Update session details. If date/time is changed, automatically updates availability status: marks old time slot as 'available' and new time slot as 'booked'.

item.name: Delete Session (User)
item.description: Delete a session. Automatically updates availability status: marks the time slot as 'available'.

item.name: Delete Session (Admin)
item.description: Delete a session. Automatically updates availability status: marks the time slot as 'available'.

item.name: Reschedule Session (User)
item.description: Reschedule an existing session to a new date/time. Automatically updates availability status: marks old time slot as 'available' and new time slot as 'booked'.

item.name: Reschedule Session (Admin)
item.description: Reschedule an existing session to a new date/time. Automatically updates availability status: marks old time slot as 'available' and new time slot as 'booked'.

item.name: Create Guest Payment Order
item.description: Creates a payment order for guest users. Guest information is stored temporarily and user account is only created after successful payment verification.

item.name: Payment Webhook
item.description: Handles payment webhooks from Razorpay. When payment is captured, login credentials will be sent to the user's email for guest bookings.

item.name: Create Guest Subscription Payment Order
item.description: Creates a subscription payment order for guest users. Guest information is stored temporarily and user account is only created after successful payment verification.

item.name: Verify Subscription Payment
item.description: Verifies subscription payment and automatically activates subscription with calculated end date based on planId. Returns updated subscription details including startDate, endDate, and nextBillingDate.

item.name: Verify Guest Payment
item.description: Verifies a guest payment and sends login credentials to the user's email after successful payment verification.

item.name: Verify Guest Subscription Payment
item.description: Verifies a guest subscription payment, activates subscription with calculated end date based on planId, and sends login credentials to the user's email after successful payment verification.

body.raw:

item.name: Availability
item.description: Manage therapist availability with time slots. Each availability entry contains time slots with start/end times and status (available/unavailable/booked). When sessions are created/rescheduled, availability status is automatically updated.

item.name: Get All Availability
item.description: Retrieve all availability entries with time slots. Each entry contains date and array of time slots with start/end times and current status (available/booked/unavailable).

item.name: Get Availability By Therapist
item.description: Retrieve availability entries for a specific therapist. Returns all dates with their respective time slots showing start/end times and current booking status.

item.name: Create Availability (Admin)
item.description: Create therapist availability for a specific date with time slots. Each time slot includes start time, end time, and status. Time slots automatically update to 'booked' when sessions are created.

item.name: Update Availability (Admin)
item.description: Update existing availability time slots. Modify start/end times and status for specific time slots. Note that 'booked' slots cannot be modified directly - they must be unbooked through session management.

item.name: Delete Availability (Admin)
item.description: Delete an availability entry for a specific date. Note: Cannot delete availability entries that have booked time slots. Cancel sessions first to free up booked slots.

item.name: Bulk Update Availability (Admin)
item.description: Bulk update therapist availability for an entire month. Creates or updates availability entries for all days in the specified month with the provided time slots template.

formdata.value: Professional physiotherapy services to help you recover faster and stronger
Updated Welcome to Our Physiotherapy Clinic
Professional physiotherapy services to help you recover faster and stronger
Dedicated to your health and wellness
Our clinic has been serving the community with quality physiotherapy services for over a decade. We combine traditional techniques with modern technology to provide the best care.
Our mission is to provide exceptional physiotherapy services that help our patients achieve optimal health and wellness.
To be the leading provider of physiotherapy services in the region, known for our excellence and patient-centered approach.

item.name: Join Video Call (WebSocket)
item.description: This endpoint is handled through WebSocket connection. Client should connect to ws://localhost:5000 and authenticate with JWT token, then emit 'join-video-call' event with sessionId.

item.name: Leave Video Call (WebSocket)
item.description: Client should emit 'leave-video-call' event with sessionId through WebSocket connection.

item.name: Send Video Call Offer (WebSocket)
item.description: Client should emit 'offer' event with WebRTC offer data through WebSocket connection.

item.name: Send Video Call Answer (WebSocket)
item.description: Client should emit 'answer' event with WebRTC answer data through WebSocket connection.

item.name: Send ICE Candidate (WebSocket)
item.description: Client should emit 'ice-candidate' event with ICE candidate data through WebSocket connection.
